sql_array: CREATE TABLE polygons_data (id UInt32, coordinates Array(Array(Array(Float64))) ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT polygonsDistanceSpherical(coordinates) FROM polygons_data WHERE id = 1 OR id = 2;
UPDATE polygons_data SET coordinates = [[[(0.5, 0.5), (0.5, 1), (1, 1), (1, 0.5)]]] WHERE id = 1;
